subcodes.first_line: All have been created for the divine meeting, and unto each hath been and will ever be allotted a portion of this most exalted station; yet the veils of creation stand between them and the divine bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع از برای لقای الهی خلق شده اند و کل را از این مقام اعلی قسمت بوده و هست ولکن احتجابات خلق مابین فیض
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @outward and inward meanings, @purpose; goal of creation
